zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Shelley於1572年出生在英國武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特時，她的父親John Shelley Esquire18歲，母親Joane Warner13歲。她於1604年12月10日與Edward Southwick在英國斯塔福爾特哈爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1635年8月在英國斯塔福爾特哈爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Shelley于1572年出生在英国武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特时，她的父亲John Shelley Esquire18岁，母亲Joane Warner13岁。她于1604年12月10日与Edward Southwick在英国斯塔福爾特哈爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1635年8月在英国斯塔福爾特哈爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Shelley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Shelley (Essex, Suffolk, Yorkshire) or from Shelley Plain in Crawley (Sussex). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish (Laois): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Sealbhaigh ‘descendant of Sealbhach’, a byname from the adjective sealbhach ‘having possessions, wealthy’.

variants.name: Shallow
meanings: Irish (Kilkenny and Wexford): variant of   Shelley  .
English: nickname from Middle English shalou(e) ‘shallow’, conjectured also to mean ‘thin’; perhaps also the same word in the topographic sense of ‘shallow place in a stretch of water’.

variants.name: Shelly
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shelley  .

variants.name: Sheley
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Shelley  .

meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Shelley was born in 1572, in Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England, her father, John Shelley Esquire, was 18 and her mother, Joane Warner, was 13. She married Edward Southwick on 10 December 1604, in Tettenhall, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. She died in August 1635, in Tettenhall, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Shelley est née en 1572, à Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Shelley Esquire, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Joane Warner, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Southwick le 10 décembre 1604, à Tettenhall, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en août 1635, à Tettenhall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Shelley 1572 in Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Shelley Esquire 18 und ihre Mutter Joane Warner 13. Sie hat am 10. Dezember 1604 in Tettenhall, Staffordshire, England Edward Southwick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Shelley è nata il nel 1572 nel Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, John Shelley Esquire, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Joane Warner, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Edward Southwick il 10 dicembre 1604, nel Tettenhall, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel agosto 1635, nel Tettenhall, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Shelleyが1572年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアキッドエルミンスターで生まれた時，父John Shelley Esquireは18歳，母Joane Warnerは13歳であった。1604年12月10日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアテッテンハルでEdward Southwickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1635年8月にイギリススタフォードシュアイアテッテンハルで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Shelley(이)가 1572년 영국 워스스터실르 키더민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Shelley Esquire(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane Warner(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1604년 12월 10일 영국 스태퍼드실르 테텐홀에서 Edward Southwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1635년 8월 영국 스태퍼드실르 테텐홀에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Shelley nasceu em 1572, em Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Shelley Esquire, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Joane Warner, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Southwick em 10 de dezembro de 1604, em Tettenhall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em agosto de 1635, em Tettenhall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Shelley родилась в 1572 г. в местности киддирминстир, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Shelley Esquire было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Warner, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Southwick 10 декабря 1604 г. в местности теттенолл, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла август 1635 г. в местности теттенолл, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

Se casó con Edward Southwick el 10 de diciembre de 1604, en Tettenhall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en agosto de 1635, en Tettenhall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
